title: Take a train or bus to a random stop you've never visited and spend 2 hours there
flavour: pick a direction. pick a stop. show up. something will happen.

title: Do something you said you'd never do — commit to it for the full day
flavour: the 'never' is a cage you built yourself. pick one. unlock it.

title: Say yes to the first invitation or opportunity that comes your way today — no matter what it is
flavour: full commitment. whatever comes. you won't die. probably.

title: Spend a full day pretending you're visiting your city as a tourist — actually do tourist things
flavour: familiarity blindness: cured. the city is stranger than you remember.

title: Sign up for something that terrifies you slightly — a performance, a competition, a presentation
flavour: fear is the compass. it's pointing at the thing. sign up for the thing.

title: Leave your phone at home for the entire day
flavour: your phone is the comfort object. walk out without it. you know where you live.

title: Delete one social media app for a week — right now
flavour: not a break. a deletion. seven days. see who you are without it.

title: Spend a full day doing the opposite of your default — introvert goes out, extrovert stays in
flavour: your defaults are defaults for a reason. override them. just once.

title: Tell someone your most embarrassing story — in person, out loud
flavour: the embarrassing story is a secret you're guarding for no reason. release it.

title: Plan a spontaneous day trip to somewhere within 2 hours — go today
flavour: you are not too busy. pick a place. get in the car/bus/train. go.
